description_long: This object consists of a complex arrangement of rectangular and box-like units, interconnected by a network of black pipes and metal rails. The central section features three vertically oriented, light-colored modules with red labels, mounted above three larger, darker rectangular boxes. Flanking the central modules are two tall, dark cabinets, each with a red label, and a smaller box attached to the right side. The entire assembly is mounted on a grid-like support structure, with visible fasteners and pipe connections. The surfaces are predominantly matte gray, with some glossy highlights on the pipes and labels. The overall appearance suggests an industrial or utility installation, possibly for electrical or control systems.
description: A complex, industrial assembly of interconnected gray boxes, cabinets, and pipes with red labels, mounted on a metal support structure. The object features multiple modules and a network of visible pipework.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full arrangement of cabinets, modules, and pipes, with all labels and connections clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the object's slim profile, with the depth of the cabinets and modules visible but little detail on the front faces.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the cabinets and modules, with the pipe network and support structure more prominent.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the object's thinness, with the depth of the components visible but minimal detail on the faces.
attribute_husk_pattern: The surface is smooth and flat, with no visible fibrous texture or natural husk pattern. The panels are uniform in color and finish, with some areas featuring labels and fasteners.
